title: Bounded Bodies, JSON, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Validation · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs bounded bodies, json, forms, multipart uploads, and validation from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the bounded request decoding and validation pipeline. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded request decoding and validation pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use MaxBytesReader and server limits to bound actual body reads independently of absent, false, compressed, or chunked Content-Length.
Decode exactly one JSON value, reject trailing content and unknown fields when the contract is closed, and distinguish syntax, type, and size failures.
Separate transport shape validation from domain invariants, normalize only defined values, accumulate safe field errors, and preserve causality internally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
